memory_entries.text: Product SQLite datasets use grouped tables: items_g1 is mainly Office Products with price column prc; items_g2 is Electronics with price columns prc (integer/cents-like) and prc_usd (listed price dollars); items_g3 is the third category (likely Musical Instruments) with price column prc. For average listed price of electronics products, use AVG(items_g2.prc_usd), ignoring NULLs.
